name: restaurant-menu-builder
description: Multi-tenant restaurant menu builder SaaS MVP.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @menu/shared && npm run build -w @menu/api && npm run build -w @menu/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @menu/shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w @menu/api" "npm run dev -w @menu/web"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @menu/shared && npm run dev -w @menu/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @menu/shared && npm run dev -w @menu/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @menu/shared && npm run typecheck -w @menu/api && npm run typecheck -w @menu/web
